## What's Changed

- Added per-channel Tube TV logo placement: top-left, top-right, bottom-right, or bottom-left.
- Cleaned up the server configuration UI with mini-tabs for larger sections.
- Split Tube TV settings into General, Commercials, and Custom Channels.
- Split Health, NNTP Providers, ARR integration, and virtual SABnzbd/API settings into smaller focused panels.

## Upgrade

Pull the latest container and restart:

```bash
docker pull ghcr.io/tatertotterson/tater-tube-server:latest
docker restart tater-tube-server
```

No configuration migration is required. Existing Tube TV channel logos default to bottom-right.
